counters.description: [ahri will constantly try to poke you and keep you out of the game. you also cant really engage her alone, due to her mobility and her e.] [try do dodge her charm and watchout for the q, since it deals true damage on its way back.] [go dorans shield + second wind, farm as much as you can, play safe, play with your jungler and try to roam as soon as you shoved the wave into her tower.] [youre stronger later into the game and should kill her pretty easily.]

[akshan is one of the worst matchups you can have. he will completly destroy you from minute 1 and your cs will suffer constantly.] [max out your q to get minions, play with your jungle and dont try to fight him on your own.] [try to get him banned. if not, go dorans shield + second wind, play safe, dont push him, try to interupt his e with your e or w, get as many minions and possible, and if your team has enough damage -> build frozen heart first aswell as plated steelcaps and go full tank afterwards.]

[anivia will try to hit her q on you so try to dodge that. you cant really engage her, because a good anivia will just wall your e.] [max out q to get minions and poke her as good you can. try to e out of her ult if she casts it.] [other than that, she has no mobility so if her q or w is out, try to make a quick engage to get some damage in and get back out.] (works better with phase rush.) [ap is better into her, because most anivia will go lyandris, so your tank build wont really work on her because of her dps.]

[ashe constant slow will be a real pain. you got trouble to reach her, due to her range and slow, while also not getting back out quickly enough.] [either wait for a gank, play passive, or go phase rush to get away quickly after you engaged her]

[a good azir can be pretty disgusting. he will poke you to death from minute one and dodges your engages with his dash.] [he will push your under his tower at level 6 so keep that in mind.] (you cant e trough his soldiers) [he outranges you completly so play safe, get minions, play with your jungle or just roam.]

[caitlyn's range is your worst nightmare.] [she will constantly be out of your range, while poking dead early into the game.] [be sure to take second wind with you, and watch the ground for her traps.] wait for her e, and then full engage her and focus her.] [with a good team, she will die pretty quickly if you all collapse on her later in the game.]

[cassio got just so much more damage than you, so dont even try to outdamage her.] [go phase rush, and dodge her q's.] [try to poke her with your q, and dont fight her alone.] [you cant e and ult if youre in her w field.]

[will bully you from minute 1.] [go dorans shield + second wind] [dont engage when he has his e, wait for his abilites to be thrown out and quickly kill him] [buy tank items with hollow radience first.]

[just dont try to fight him, he does so much more damage than you, and can interupt your e and w with his knockback.] [your best chance is to go tank, and run him down later into the game with your team.]

[she can deal some nasty damage, and is pretty mobile with her e.] she can also escape your stun with her ult while also receiving quite the shield.] [focus her and try to stun her as long as possible while you and youre team finishes her quickly, before she can cast her ult.] [early into the game, do not get to close, because you will get her full q.]

[a good leblanc, wont cast her w onto you, and will keep her distance while poking you dead with basic attacks and q, e.] [go dorans shield + second wind, try to play safe as possible, and engage her if her w or rw is on cooldown.] [you can also e out of her e.] [really hard to gank her, so try to push the wave into her tower, to roam quickly.]

[leona will keep you off her adc, so you have a hard time to catch someone.] [dont focus her in fights, and just try to dodge her e and ult, while also getting close to her adc.] [she is to tanky, to fully focus her, so try your best to ignore her, even if she deals some serious damage while stunning you.]
[you cant engage him with his e up, so dont even try.] [coordinate with your teammates and interrupt his ult with your w or e if you can.]
[she can interupt your e and w with her w and her ult, so try to wait until one of these are out.] [try to dodge her q and keep her of her adc if you can.]

[he can completly shutdown your e and w with his q so wait for that or dodge it.] [he can also cleanse enemies from your w with his ult.] [if he gets to close, to poke you with his q out, engage him and quickly finish him.]

[completly counters your entire kit.] [she will q if you want to engage and if you should manage to get close, she will just counter your stuns with her e.] [you also wont get away from her due to her ult.] [try to wait for her e to be casted, or bait her by running at her, so she shields herself and then quickly turn to another enemy or the adc, or vice versa.] [you can also just ban her.]

[deals some insane amount of damage, and you cant onehshot her dogs.] [dodge her q and e into her, when she casts her w or e.] quickly trade some damage if her q is out, because that will do the most damage.]

[q, q, q, q, q, q] [yea she will just constantly poke you and deny your farm.] [go dorans shield + second wind, consider going tank, and catch her together with your jungle.] [ keep an eye on her ball to dodge her w and ult.]

[will destroy you from level 1.] [you can interrupt his w with a perfectly timed e, but he has just too much damage and low cooldown.] [just try to get as much farm as possible, start dorans shield + second wind and go back as soon as your low life, because his q deals execute damage.] [other than that just either ban him or pray to god.]
[keep your distance to walls.] [dodge her q's, w inside her invisiblity field, and just quickly shut her down with a full combo.]

[she is way to fast in her ult, so dont even try to catch her with it on and just get away.] [channel your w with different timings each time to confuse her, when she needs to e to block yout taunt. for example, you can fully channel it the first time, and just 0.5 seconds the next.] [also her waveclear is too heavy, so try to stay under your tower.]

[you cant fight him in his ult. play with phase rush, trade with him as best as possible and quickly get out and wait for his ult to run out, if he casts it.] [again you cant fight him in his ult. just dont.]

[try to dodge her q and her e as best you can.] [dont engage her head on, because she will just shove you away with her e.] [play with your jungle and wait for her e.] [save your w, if she throws her ult at you to reduce the damage.]

[disgusting. she will constantly throw rocks at you, and you cant e trough the e field.] [try to dodge her w and engage her with your jungle.] [try to interupt her ult with your w so she cant get away.] [also go dorans shield and second wind.]
[you cant do anything against her early.][your best chance is to go frozen heart, plated steelcaps and thornmail.] [be careful, since she will try to engage you from level 2 - 3.]
[standard ban. she has too much damage, mobility and will just e you away if you get to close.] [either run her down with all 4 mates or ban her.]
[again, try to dodge her skillshots, and dont charge into her with your e headon. she will just w and interrupt your dash.] [try to poke her low and finish her with your mates.]
[her e does the most damage, while also stunning you, so keep track of her feathers.] [wait for her ult before you cast w, or get a quick w out followed by an e to stun her before she can even ult.]

[you need to dodge her e's. thats where the mist damage comes from.] [if you got hit by the e, quickly e away from her, so she has a harder time to reach you.] [but if her e is out, she can be run down pretty quickly.] [also go doran shield + second wind to counter the poke.]

[smolder is pretty disgusting to play against. he isnt really that hard to play against, but he can stack his passive pretty easily on you while also staying at distance most of the time. he becomes a massive threat later into the game for your team. your best chance is to focus him and keep him out of the game and away from stacking with help of your teammates or jungler. full tank doesnt help you against his true damage so play with some ap to kill him quickly. try to get his e out and stick to him, because he is stronger at range, so keep him stunned and taunted, so he cant pull out his aoe damage on your teammates.]

synergies.description: [full stun combo.] [cast your ult, if he casted his ult.]
[doesnt offer anything special, besides his slow and root from gravitum.]
[her slow and ult can help you reach the enemy quite easily, but she needs some protection, because she has no sustain or mobilty.]
[she can just safely farm with her range, and you just cosplay as her bodyguard.] [just peel her, and keep the enemies of her.] [you can also catch someone easily if they are trapped.]
[cast your ult if she casted her, and the enemy cant escape your r.]
[again, ult her if she casted ult, so get a some serious damage and crowd control in the fight.]
[with your damage amplify build, he can almost oneshot enemies, but he needs some protection, because he will get focused.]
[not much you can do her, despite just letting him farm and peeling him.]
[full stun combo.] [just like camille, cast your ult if he casted his to guarantee your ult on the enemies.]
[you can engage some enemies and he simply roots them with his w, but i would rather just try to keep him alive because he has no sustain and not that much mobility early.]
[if she casted her w or e, you can catch the enemies rather easily, but again, she has no sustain or dash, so just try to keep her alive.]
[kaisa can mostly take care of herself, so just engage the enemies with her to deal some serious damage.]
[with her peel build and her bond on you together with knight's vow, you can keep deal some serious damage while keeping her alive.]
[again cast your ult if he manages to land some stuns with his.]
[you can ult into her ult, as soon as it expires to finish of low health enemies.]
[he needs so much protection, that you just cant really leave his side.] [just try to keep enemies off of him.]
[nothing special here.]
[full stun combo.] [if he ults in, you follow him with your ult.]
[full stun combo, but he can knock enemies away with his q so be careful, to not cast your e or w into nothing.]
[she can cast her ult, if you manage to taunt some enemies with your w, for some serious damage.]
[early game is a bit harder for her, but you two can just run the enemies down and kill everything if played correctly.]
[his ult slows, so you can also ult his ult.]
[full stun combo.]
[full stun combo.] [ult her ult and watch the enemies cry.]
[she can quickly follow you into a fight with her passive.] [just run the enemies down, and try to hold your w for her ult, so she wont be interupted.]
[keep the enemies stunned with your w, and let seraphine do the rest with her e and ult.]
[nothing more satisfying than, 2 shields onto a teammate, that was just about to die.] [you both can quickly turn the fight with your ults.]
[full stun combo.]
[nothing special here.]
[keep the enemies stunned, and watch her destroy them, with her fully stacked e.] [she is pretty mobile with her w, so dont try to outplay each other by dashing into 2 different directions.]
[if you manage to keep him alive, he deals some serious damage.]
[full stun combo.] [works awesome with his ult and his e, but he needs some protection because he has no sustain or moblity.]
[fully peel her.] [keep every enemy of her and watch her carry the game for you.]
[nothing special here.] [you can engage, if she manages to stun someone with her e.]
[he can ult into the knockup from your ult or e. great for catching enemies and shutting them down.]
[full stun combo.] [if he lands his ult on some enemies, you can ult him, and destroy everything.]
[if he jumps in a fight with his e, and manages to hit someone, quickly ult him, because he will continue to cc the enemies with his q and ult.]
[nothing special here.] [she is pretty mobile, so you can just engage enemies together and kill them.]
